CodificationSection was based on last paragraph under heading “FOR LIFE-SAVING AND LIFE-BOAT STATIONS” of , , insofar as such paragraph provided for the right to use and occupy sites for pier-head beacons. Provisions of such paragraph relating to the right to use and occupy sites for Coast Guard Stations and houses of refuge were classified to section 96 of former Title 14, Coast Guard, and were repealed by , , and restated as , Coast Guard. was subsequently renumbered .act Mar. 3, 1875, ch. 13018 Stat. 372act Aug. 4, 1949, ch. 393, § 2063 Stat. 561section 92(f) of Title 14Section 92(f) of Title 14section 501(f) of Title 14
